title: Review Report
description: Complete review report from a single review agent or the meta-reviewer synthesis.

agent.description: The agent that produced this report (or 'meta-reviewer' for the synthesis report).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the review completed.

verdict.description: The gate decision. APPROVE: no findings >= P2. APPROVE_WITH_ADVISORIES: P2 findings present but no P0/P1. BLOCK: P0 or P1 findings present.

findings.description: All findings from this review, sorted by severity (P0 first).

blocking_count.description: Number of findings that block the merge.

files_reviewed.description: List of files that were reviewed.

checklist_coverage.description: For agents with a defined checklist (e.g., Debt Gatekeeper): fraction of items evaluated (e.g., '23/23'). For other agents: 'N/A'.

meta.description: Meta-reviewer-only fields. Present only in synthesis reports.

agent_reports_received.description: List of agent names whose reports were synthesized.

duplicates_removed.description: Number of duplicate findings removed during synthesis.
